rent.note: furnished 1BR city centre avg £389 (~$490); outside centre £282 (~$355)

groceries.note: home cooking; Bulgaria very cheap for food

diningOut.note: Old Town cafes; Bulgarian restaurants cheap

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; smaller scene than Sofia but growing

simData.note: Bulgarian SIM; A1 or Yettel; cheap unlimited

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Inland second city; mild seasonality.

evidence.claim: total monthly spend ~£919 (~$1,160); single person ex-rent £530 (~$670)
evidence.quote: You can expect to spend around £919 per month for 1 person. On average, a single person needs £530 per month without rent
The average monthly rent for a 1-bedroom apartment in the city centre is £389, compared to £282 outside the centre

evidence.claim: utilities for 85m2 avg £74; monthly bus pass £18; one-way £0.44
evidence.quote: Basic utilities in Plovdiv cost an average of £74 per month. A monthly pass is typically priced at £18

evidence.claim: Bulgaria 10% flat tax; Plovdiv cheaper than Sofia and popular for expats
evidence.quote: Bulgaria is increasingly seen as a practical and accessible base for digital nomads in Europe. With its flat 10% income tax rate and affordable lifestyle
